proposals.reason: EU Commission announced pilot programme for breakthrough medical devices and IVDs on 15 April 2026, implementing MDCG 2025-9.

card.t: EU Breakthrough Devices Pilot Programme Launched
card.x: European Commission launched a pilot programme to support breakthrough medical devices and IVDs under MDR/IVDR, implementing MDCG 2025-9 guidance. New innovation pathway for high-impact MDSW.

proposals.reason: MHRA secured GBP 3.6M to expand AI Airlock regulatory sandbox, announced April 2026. Phase 2 report expected Summer 2026.

card.x: DHSC allocated £1.2M/year for 3 years to expand the MHRA AI Airlock regulatory sandbox for AI medical devices. Phase 2 exploring LLMs, voice tools, cancer and rare disease diagnostics. Report expected Summer 2026.

proposals.reason: UK and US announced deepened regulatory cooperation on medical devices in April 2026, exploring mutual recognition.

card.x: MHRA and FDA announced strengthened cooperation on medical device regulation, exploring future mutual recognition mechanisms to reduce duplication for manufacturers.

proposals.reason: Health Canada published pre-market guidance for ML-enabled medical devices on 1 April 2026.

card.t: Canada: ML-Enabled Medical Device Guidance Published
card.x: Health Canada published pre-market guidance for machine learning-enabled medical devices, providing clear regulatory pathway for AI/ML SaMD in Canada.

proposals.reason: IMDRF published 29th Management Committee meeting outcome statement on 7 April 2026, covering SaMD and AI/ML working group progress.

card.x: 29th Management Committee meeting outcomes published. N90 PCCP for SaMD finalizing (target Sep 2026). N88 GMLP published Feb 2026. Strategic Plan 2026-2030 in force.

proposals.reason: CNIL/HAS AI Healthcare Guide consultation closed on 16 April 2026. Status changed from consultation open to publication expected Q2 2026.

card.t: CNIL/HAS AI Healthcare Guide — Consultation Closed
card.x: Joint guide on AI deployment in healthcare covering acquisition through uninstallation, governance, and generative AI specifics. Consultation closed 16 Apr. Final publication expected Q2 2026.

proposals.reason: CNIL published guidance on tracking pixels in emails on 14 April 2026. Relevant for health apps using email communications.

card.x: CNIL published guidance requiring better transparency on tracking pixels in emails. Relevant for health apps and medical device software communicating via email with patients or HCPs.

proposals.reason: Japan PMDA mandated eCTD v4.0 format from 1 April 2026 and established priority review for revolutionary SaMD.

card.t: Japan: eCTD v4.0 Mandatory + Revolutionary SaMD Priority Review
card.x: PMDA only accepts eCTD v4.0 format from 1 Apr 2026. Priority review system for revolutionary SaMD established with concierge services. Consultations available from Jun 2026.

proposals.reason: FDA held town hall on QMSR and risk-based inspections on 1 April 2026, providing clarity on the new inspection approach.

card.t: FDA QMSR Town Hall — Risk-Based Inspections
card.x: FDA held town hall on QMSR implementation and the new medical device risk-based inspection approach using Compliance Program 7382.850.
